rationale: The page contains brief biographical information and major works of the 2025 Nobel Prize in Literature winner, Laszlo Krasznahorkai. It is a standard content page, although it contains very little text.
cleanedText:
4.1.2 NOBEL PRIZE IN LITERATURE, 2025
Hungarian writer Laszlo Krasznahorkai won 2025 Nobel Prize in Literature.
* Laszlo Krasznahorkai was born in 1954 in Gyula, Hungary, near the Romanian border.
* Major works: Satantango (1985), The Melancholy of Resistance (1989), War & War (1999), etc.
